prestazioni: Engine swap to a ZMZ-51432 CRS turbocharged diesel (2.2L, 114 HP stock) with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, upgraded to 220 HP and 380 Nm torque via a custom ECU map from ChipTuning UAZ (Moscow-based tuner specializing in ZMZ engines).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF7Z) for the rear axle and a custom heavy-duty transfer case from UAZ-Tuning (St. Petersburg) with reinforced gears and a 4.55:1 final drive ratio for off-road crawling.

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins TTX 22M coilovers (custom valving for the Hunter’s leaf spring front and 5-link rear setup) paired with Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1104K) and a custom 2-inch lift kit from Old Man Emu (OME) designed specifically for the Hunter’s chassis (part #OME-KIT-UAZ-HUNTER).
estetica: Full custom overland body kit from UAZ-Tuning, including a reinforced steel front bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 10-S winch (part #101570) and a rear swing-out tire carrier with dual jerry can mounts (part #UAZ-HUNTER-SWING).

Custom fiberglass fender flares from Rocket Bunny (modified to fit the Hunter’s body lines) paired with 17-inch Method MR701 wheels (part #MR701-1790-6) wrapped in 285/70R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires (part #33176).

Full interior roll cage from Custom Cages (UK) designed for the Hunter’s cabin dimensions (part #CC-UAZ-HUNTER-6PT) with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (part #00872NR) and a custom dashboard overlay from DashMat (part #DM-UAZ-HUNTER) in carbon fiber finish.
